title: oldenlandia purpurea var. tenuifolia
intro: Oldenlandia purpurea var. tenuifolia, also known as Purple Milkwort, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Ayurvedic medicine, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Oldenlandia purpurea var. tenuifolia is commonly prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tea for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in herbal supplements and capsules.
